steps.title: Identify the repeated pattern
steps.content: The passage describes what happened over decades: new calculations “would reveal increasingly precise coordinates, yet the prime meridian remained unchanged.” The habitual “would reveal” signals a recurrent pattern—new data kept appearing, the official position never changed—until the 1980s finally broke it.

steps.title: Apply the pattern to the choices
steps.content: ”Again and again” directly names this repeated, cyclical nature. The other choices either introduce a detail, suggest purpose, or concede a claim without capturing the recurring pattern essential to the passage. This matches choice C — C is correct.
